user.title: AFERIY PS240 (Local) verbinden
user.description: Geben Sie die Netzwerkdaten Ihrer AFERIY PS240 Batterie ein. Die Batterie muss unter der angegebenen IP-Adresse erreichbar sein.

error.cannot_connect: Verbindung nicht möglich. Prüfen Sie IP-Adresse, Port und ob die Batterie online ist.
error.unknown: Unerwarteter Fehler. Details im Home Assistant-Protokoll.

init.title: AFERIY PS240 (Local) neu konfigurieren
init.description: Verbindungsdaten ändern. Home Assistant verbindet sich sofort neu.

data_description.advanced_energy_sensors: Fügt optionale Schätzsensoren hinzu, die externe Netz-, Solarprognose- und Verbrauchsdaten verwenden können.
data_description.poll_interval: Wie oft die Batterie lokal abgefragt wird, in Sekunden.
data_description.tariff_preset: Defaults to Octopus Intelligent Go. Named presets store their listed times automatically; choose custom to edit the times manually.
data_description.off_peak_start: Start of your cheap-rate charging window in 24-hour HH:MM format. Used only when the preset is custom.
data_description.off_peak_end: End of your cheap-rate charging window in 24-hour HH:MM format. Used only when the preset is custom.
data_description.dependency_solcast_confirmed: Needed for timed solar forecasts, Will Fill Today, charge-time estimates, and the smarter overnight target.
data_description.dependency_grid_meter_confirmed: Recommended for trusted import/export comparison. A Shelly Pro 3EM or equivalent whole-home CT meter is ideal.
data_description.dependency_recorder_confirmed: Needed so runtime and overnight target estimates can learn normal house demand by time of day.
data_description.dependency_octopus_energy_confirmed: Only needed for automations or diagnostics that react to Octopus off-peak/free-electricity sensors. The integration can use the configured tariff window without it.
data_description.dependency_home_occupancy_confirmed: Recommended so empty-house periods do not train the normal demand profile.

error.cannot_connect: Verbindung nicht möglich. Prüfen Sie IP-Adresse, Port und ob die Batterie online ist.
error.unknown: Unerwarteter Fehler. Details im Home Assistant-Protokoll.
